name: Smothered Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. If using rice vermicelli, soak it in boiling water for 10 minutes and drain. If using fresh noodles, use as is.
2. Slice broccoli into florets and peel the skin if too tough. Discard the leaves.
3. Blend together all the SEASONINGS.
4. Heat 1/4 cup oil in a wok over high heat. Add the drained noodles and thick soy sauce (use regular soy sauce if the thick variety is unavailable). Stir-fry for 3 minutes. Remove to individual serving plates and keep warm.
5. Reduce heat slightly and add remaining oil. Add garlic and stir-fry until golden.
6. Add the broccoli and SEASONINGS mixture, plus 2 1/2 cups boiling water. Cook for 3 minutes until the sauce thickens.
7. Divide the sauce evenly over the noodles.
